This week is lining up to be a good week to go fishing.

Quality setups I usually look for are lacking/failing and market conditions are breaking down. Good to trade less and protect your capital in these times because our market is coming.

- Cash is a position
- You don’t have to trade in times of volatility 
- Nobody is making you click buttons
- Patience pays
- Our market is coming
